---
title: ""
code-overflow: wrap
author:
  - Yan Rodríguez-Hachimaru
date: today
format:
  pdf:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          \usepackage{fvextra}
          \RecustomVerbatimEnvironment{verbatim}{Verbatim}{breaklines=true,breakanywhere=true, breaksymbol={}}
      - file: assets/draft/preamble.tex
    code-overflow: wrap
    pdf-engine: lualatex
    documentclass: article
    classoption: [a4paper, 11pt]
    geometry: "top=2.5cm, bottom=2.5cm, left=2.5cm, right=2.5cm"
    linestretch: 1.15
    cite-method: citeproc
    toc: false
    toc-depth: 2
    toc-title: "Contenido"
    number-sections: false
    execute:
      echo: false
---

{{< include content/Manuscrito.qmd >}}
